attributes.whois:
NetRange: 127.0.0.0 - 127.255.255.255
CIDR: 127.0.0.0/8
NetName: SPECIAL-IPV4-LOOPBACK-IANA-RESERVED
NetHandle: NET-127-0-0-0-1
Parent: ()
NetType: IANA Special Use
OriginAS: 
Organization: Internet Assigned Numbers Authority (IANA)
RegDate: 
Updated: 2013-08-30
Comment: Addresses starting with "127." are used when one program needs to talk to another program running on the same machine using the Internet 
Comment: Protocol. 127.0.0.1 is the most commonly used address and is called the "loopback" address.
Comment: 
Comment: These addresses were assigned by the IETF, the organization that develops Internet protocols, in the Standard document, RFC 1122, which can 
Comment: be found here:
Comment: http://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/rfc1122
Ref: https://rdap.arin.net/registry/ip/127.0.0.0
OrgName: Internet Assigned Numbers Authority
OrgId: IANA
Address: 12025 Waterfront Drive
Address: Suite 300
City: Los Angeles
StateProv: CA
PostalCode: 90292
Country: US
RegDate: 
Updated: 2012-08-31
Ref: https://rdap.arin.net/registry/entity/IANA

crowdsourced_context.details: This IP was involved in 154391 events across 27 distinct attack types. attributes.whois:
NetRange: 224.0.0.0 - 239.255.255.255
CIDR: 224.0.0.0/4
NetName: MCAST-NET
NetHandle: NET-224-0-0-0-1
Parent: ()
NetType: IANA Special Use
OriginAS: 
Organization: Internet Assigned Numbers Authority (IANA)
RegDate: 1991-05-22
Updated: 2024-05-24
Comment: Addresses starting with a number between 224 and 239 are used for IP multicast. IP multicast is a technology for efficiently sending the same content to multiple destinations. It is commonly used for distributing financial information and video streams, among other things.
Comment: 
Comment: A full list of IPv4 multicast assignments can be found at:
Comment: 
Comment: http://www.iana.org/assignments/multicast-addresses
Comment: 
Comment: A document describing the policies for assigning multicast addresses can be found at:
Comment: http://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/rfc5771

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects an XORed URL in an executable
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects an XORed URL in an executable
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
Felix Bilstein - yara-signator at cocacoding dot com

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (DLL) (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO Hiloti Style GET to PHP with invalid terse MSIE headers
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET INFO Hiloti Style GET to PHP with invalid terse MSIE headers"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"GET"; http.uri; content:".php?"; http.user_agent; content:"Mozilla/4.0|20|(compatible|3b 20|MSIE|20|"; content:!"8"; within:1; content:"|3b 20|Windows|20|NT|20|"; distance:0; content:!"SlimBrowser"; http.host; content:!".taobao.com"; content:!".dict.cn"; content:!".avg.com"; content:!".weather.hao.360.cn"; content:!"es.f.360.cn"; http.header_names; content:"|0d 0a|User-Agent|0d 0a|Host|0d 0a|"; depth:20; fast_pattern; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2012612; rev:18; metadata:created_at 2011_03_31, former_category TROJAN, updated_at 2020_08_31;)
alert ( gid:116; sid:3; rev:2; msg:"(ipv4) IPv4 datagram length < header field"; metadata: policy max-detect-ips drop, rule-type decode; classtype:protocol-command-decode;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: (stream_tcp) data sent on stream after TCP reset sent
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:129; sid:8; rev:2; msg:"(stream_tcp) data sent on stream after TCP reset sent"; metadata: policy max-detect-ips drop, rule-type preproc; classtype:protocol-command-decode;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET DNS Query to a .tk domain - Likely Hostile
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET DNS Query to a .tk domain - Likely Hostile"; dns.query; content:".tk"; fast_pattern; nocase; endswith; content:!"www.google.tk"; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2012811; rev:7; metadata:created_at 2011_05_15, former_category DNS, updated_at 2020_09_17;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: SURICATA STREAM ESTABLISHED SYNACK resend with different seq
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp any any -> any any (msg:"SURICATA STREAM ESTABLISHED SYNACK resend with different seq"; stream-event:est_synack_resend_with_diff_seq; classtype:protocol-command-decode; sid:2210024; rev:2;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO Hiloti Style GET to PHP with invalid terse MSIE headers
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET INFO Hiloti Style GET to PHP with invalid terse MSIE headers"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"GET"; http.uri; content:".php?"; http.user_agent; content:"Mozilla/4.0|20|(compatible|3b 20|MSIE|20|"; content:!"8"; within:1; content:"|3b 20|Windows|20|NT|20|"; distance:0; content:!"SlimBrowser"; http.host; content:!".taobao.com"; content:!".dict.cn"; content:!".avg.com"; content:!".weather.hao.360.cn"; content:!"es.f.360.cn"; http.header_names; content:"|0d 0a|User-Agent|0d 0a|Host|0d 0a|"; depth:20; fast_pattern; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2012612; rev:18; metadata:created_at 2011_03_31, former_category TROJAN, updated_at 2020_08_31;)
alert ( gid:116; sid:3; rev:2; msg:"(ipv4) IPv4 datagram length < header field"; metadata: policy max-detect-ips drop, rule-type decode; classtype:protocol-command-decode;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: (stream_tcp) data sent on stream after TCP reset sent
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:129; sid:8; rev:2; msg:"(stream_tcp) data sent on stream after TCP reset sent"; metadata: policy max-detect-ips drop, rule-type preproc; classtype:protocol-command-decode;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET DNS Query to a .tk domain - Likely Hostile
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET DNS Query to a .tk domain - Likely Hostile"; dns.query; content:".tk"; fast_pattern; nocase; endswith; content:!"www.google.tk"; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2012811; rev:7; metadata:created_at 2011_05_15, former_category DNS, updated_at 2020_09_17;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: SURICATA STREAM ESTABLISHED SYNACK resend with different seq
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp any any -> any any (msg:"SURICATA STREAM ESTABLISHED SYNACK resend with different seq"; stream-event:est_synack_resend_with_diff_seq; classtype:protocol-command-decode; sid:2210024; rev:2;)

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET INFO Hiloti Style GET to PHP with invalid terse MSIE headers"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"GET"; http.uri; content:".php?"; http.user_agent; content:"Mozilla/4.0|20|(compatible|3b 20|MSIE|20|"; content:!"8"; within:1; content:"|3b 20|Windows|20|NT|20|"; distance:0; content:!"SlimBrowser"; http.host; content:!".taobao.com"; content:!".dict.cn"; content:!".avg.com"; content:!".weather.hao.360.cn"; content:!"es.f.360.cn"; http.header_names; content:"|0d 0a|User-Agent|0d 0a|Host|0d 0a|"; depth:20; fast_pattern; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2012612; rev:18; metadata:created_at 2011_03_31, former_category TROJAN, updated_at 2020_08_31;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET DNS Query to a .tk domain - Likely Hostile
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET DNS Query to a .tk domain - Likely Hostile"; dns.query; content:".tk"; fast_pattern; nocase; endswith; content:!"www.google.tk"; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2012811; rev:7; metadata:created_at 2011_05_15, former_category DNS, updated_at 2020_09_17;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: TGI HUNT Abused TLD .tk in DNS
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns any any -> any any (msg:"TGI HUNT Abused TLD .tk in DNS"; flow:established; dns_query; content:".tk"; endswith; threshold:type limit, track by_src, seconds 60, count 1; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2610006; rev:1;)

alert udp $HOME_NET any -> any 53 ( msg:"INDICATOR-COMPROMISE Suspicious .tk dns query"; flow:to_server; byte_test:1,!&,0xF8,2; content:"|02|tk|00|",fast_pattern,nocase; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop,policy security-ips drop; service:dns; reference:url,en.wikipedia.org/wiki/.tk; classtype:misc-activity; sid:39867; rev:4; )
